summary: Phase 1 refinements + Phase 2 Execution Review fully verified. Backend 11/11 pytest pass (including new rolled_back decision). Frontend E2E: all new Phase 1 surfaces (header, status pill inactive/active toggle, welcome-secondary-line, footer text, menu best-for, armed banner, preparing transition) and all Phase 2 Execution Review components (execution-summary with 4 KPIs, activity-timeline expand/collapse, file-explorer with diff-viewer/change-summary/diff-section/diff-line-add/remove/context, protected-files-panel toggles, rollback-action-button) verified. Iteration 1's _id leak is FIXED: POST/GET /api/reviews now returns 'id' (no '_id').
critical_code_review_comments: ExecutionReviewPanel uses onSelect toggling: clicking the currently selected file deselects it (closes diff). Behaviour is fine, but worth documenting because it confused the initial test pass. Consider keeping selection sticky (clicking same file no-op).

App.tsx still has `m.role === 'assistant' ? openCheckpoint : undefined` ternary which was identical-branch in iteration 1 — now simplified, but on read it's still passing openCheckpoint to all assistant messages, which is correct.
ReviewPanel re-runs the 650ms 'preparing' timer when `output?.id` changes while open — this would double-flash if the target is swapped while panel is open (edge case, low priority).
ProtectedFilesPanel auto-unlock toggle persists per-message in conversation state via toggleProtected — verified state flips. No issues.
Backend serialization fix from iteration 1 is in place: `_serialize(decision)` uses `model_dump(by_alias=False)` → response has `id` not `_id`. Verified via curl.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all new Phase 1+2 surfaces verified this iteration; approve/reject/challenge flows verified in iteration 1 and unchanged

seed_data_creation: Inserted ~6 TEST_ prefixed reviews during pytest run, including a rolled_back decision; plus UI-triggered decisions (rolled_back, approved/rejected/challenged) into claude_checkpoint.reviews
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1+2 fully green. The DiffViewer toggle behaviour (click selected = deselect) is intentional but confusing for tests: by default ExecutionReviewPanel pre-selects the first non-locked file, so diff-viewer is visible on open — tests should NOT click the already-selected row first. For approve/reject/challenge re-verification, use a single fresh page session per flow (the multi-flow sequential test in iteration 2 had a UI timing issue with the third sequential open — not a product bug; ActionBar buttons are confirmed present because rollback (same ActionBar) worked).
